packages.name: Basic Care Package
packages.sarah_pitch: Our Basic Care Package is perfect for maintaining your healthy smile. For just $99 per month, you get two professional cleanings, an annual exam, and X-rays included. Plus, you'll save 10% on any additional treatments you might need.

packages.name: Premium Care Package
packages.ideal_for: Those seeking comprehensive dental care and cosmetic enhancements
packages.sarah_pitch: The Premium Care Package gives you everything in Basic, plus quarterly cleanings, professional whitening, and priority scheduling. At $199 per month, it's our most popular choice for people who want to maintain a brilliant, healthy smile year-round.

packages.name: Family Care Package
packages.ideal_for: Families with children or multiple members needing care
packages.sarah_pitch: Our Family Care Package is designed for busy families. For $299 per month, you can cover up to 4 family members with unlimited cleanings, all exams, and special care for children including fluoride treatments. We'll even assign you a dedicated coordinator to manage everyone's appointments.

packages.name: Corporate Wellness Package
packages.ideal_for: Businesses wanting to provide dental benefits to employees
packages.sarah_pitch: We offer Corporate Wellness Packages for businesses looking to provide dental benefits. We can do on-site screenings, provide flexible scheduling for your team, and offer custom pricing based on the number of employees. Let's discuss what would work best for your company.

cold_call_script_templates.introduction: Hello, this is Sarah calling from SmileCare Dental Clinic. I'm reaching out today because we're offering special dental care packages in your area. Do you have a moment to hear about our services?
cold_call_script_templates.qualification: Are you currently happy with your dental care provider? When was your last dental checkup?
cold_call_script_templates.package_presentation: Based on what you've told me, I think our {package_name} would be perfect for you. {sarah_pitch}

objection_handling.too_expensive: I understand cost is a concern. Keep in mind this includes preventive care that can help you avoid costly emergency treatments later. Plus, we offer a 10% discount if you sign up today.
objection_handling.already_have_dentist: That's great that you have a dentist! Many of our clients actually keep their current dentist and use our package for additional preventive care or family members. Would that be of interest?
objection_handling.need_to_think: Absolutely, I understand. Can I send you more information via email? Also, we have a limited-time offer ending this month - would you like me to reserve a spot for you while you decide?

cold_call_script_templates.closing: Wonderful! I'd love to get you scheduled for a consultation where we can show you our facility and answer any questions. What day works best for you this week?
cold_call_script_templates.follow_up: Thank you for your time today. I'll send you the package details via email. Feel free to call us at any time if you have questions. Have a great day!
